title: feat: add p0 admin dry-run review surface
goal: Add read-only admin review surface for local/internal reaction dispatch dry-run adapter boundary metadata without approval or external execution.

risks.risk: Accidental dry-run approval or external execution from review endpoint.
risks.mitigation: GET routes only project existing safe metadata; tests assert no approval, adapter, IRIS Core, VOXWEAVE, TTS, Live2D, renderer, OBS, or WebSocket execution.

risks.risk: Raw message, payload, wallet, secret, private URL, adapter URL, webhook URL, header, or token exposure.
risks.mitigation: Projection returns hashes, statuses, and reason codes only; tests assert forbidden raw strings are absent.

risks.risk: Review endpoint mutates support, outbox, lease, attempt plan, or dry-run boundary state.
risks.mitigation: The new handlers do not call repository write methods or audit writes; tests compare stored state before and after reads.

risks.risk: Committed local evidence must be refreshed with PR current-head GitHub run and artifact IDs.
risks.mitigation: Refresh PR evidence after PR creation, then confirm same-head CI, contracts, quality-gate, and safe artifact.
